question.content: For the quarter-circular bar AB with radius R and solid circular cross-section diameter d, where d << R, end A fixed, and end B free under an out-of-plane concentrated force F, determine the twist angle at the free end. Answer format: a single algebraic expression for θ_B; write only the expression, with no explanatory text or equals sign.

step_1.content: Set the geometric model and load orientation for the quarter-circular bar.
step_1.key_point: Identify fixed end, free end, arc radius, and out-of-plane force direction.

step_3.content: Combine torsional and bending deformation contributions along the curved axis to obtain the end twist.
step_3.key_point: Target quantity is the free-end rotation around the bar axis at B.
